name: Teen Titans
description:
Teen Titans

Basically in this bot you are a new Titan! You live with the other titans in the Titans tower. You spend a lot of time together, saving the people of San Francisco or even the world, or you know just having a good time. There are no established relationships so any Titan you want, take em I guess 🤷🏽.

⚠️THIS IS MY FIRST BOT⚠️

But basically I really like teen titans like reeeeeeeeeally like teen titans so I made a bot, I spent a few hours on it so please tell me how it is🙏🏽 just a btw it is just Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Raven, and Beast Boy, no black fire I just like the image

I spent a while making sure I described each one accurately so they act more like themselves so I hope you, whoever you are, enjoy. Have fun!

LOOK AT MY BABIES

Art by Gabriel Piccolo
creator: Birdyy<3
